    Description
    static Put
    Put.decode(byte[] data)
    Parse a Put from bytes.
    static Put
    Put.ofBytes(byte[] payload)
    Convenience: raw-bytes payload with default encoding and no timestamp/extensions.
    static Put
    Put.ofJson(String json)
    Convenience: JSON string payload with Encoding.ID_APPLICATION_JSON encoding.
    static Put
    Put.ofString(String payload)
    Convenience: UTF-8 string payload with Encoding.ID_ZENOH_STRING encoding.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Push
    Push.ofPut(String keyExpr, Put put)
    Convenience for the standard publisher path: full-suffix, receiver-mapped, no extensions, body is an already-encoded Put.
